Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: 1 Analyze the Event Log Case 1 RA to VF to AE to RMI to VF to AD to SC to AC Case 2 RA to VF to AE to AD to SC to AC Case 3 RA to VF to AE to RMI to RMI to VF to AD to SC to AC

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: 2 Identify Patterns and Structure Start End Every case starts with Receive Application RA and ends with Archive Case AC Core Sequence Always starts with Receive Application RA followed by Validate Form VF Then Assess Eligibility AE follows VF Suffix pattern to AD to SC to AC

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Looping Repetition Behavior After Assess Eligibility AE things diverge In Case 2 it goes straight to AD In Case 1 it goes to RMI to VF to AD In Case 3 it goes to RMI to RMI to VF to AD This looks like an optional loop structure involving requesting missing info and re validating The transition is from AE to either AD or entering the fix phase The fix phase involves Request Missing Info RMI happening one or more times then Validate Form VF happens exactly once before going to AD

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Refine the loop definition based on standard process mining operators The operator is defined as do A then either exit or do B then A again Applying this to our log We want to capture sequence RA VF AE Optional Loop AD SC AC

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Hypothesis 1 Use XOR for optional loop X tau DirectPath LoopPath Hypothesis 2 The loop operator in this prompt context might allow A to be optional No text says A is executed So to represent Case 2 which skips the loop entirely alongside Cases 1 and 3 we likely need an XOR at the higher level

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Observed subtraces between AE and AD 1 Empty 2 RMI VF 3 RMI RMI VF This looks like RMI star followed by VF but Case 2 does NOT have the second VF This suggests that the second VF is only present if RMI happened So X tau to star RMI VF

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Now does this fit the specific star definition star RMI tau Do RMI then Stop or tau then RMI Matches RMI cluster Fix Block to star RMI tau VF Middle Node X tau to star RMI tau VF

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Tree to RA VF AE X tau to star RMI tau VF AD SC AC Check Case 2 RA VF AE AD SC AC XOR node Chooses tau Match Check Case 1 RA VF AE RMI VF AD XOR right Seq Loop RMI VF Match Check Case 3 RA VF AE RMI RMI VF AD Loop RMI tau RMI then VF Match

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Alternative interpretation Could the XOR be inside the loop star X RMI tau VF This forces VF every iteration Trace 3 RMI RMI VF only one VF at end Proposed structure puts VF outside the loop inside the XOR choice branch VF happens only once after RMIs This fits the data perfectly

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Assemble the full tree Root SEQUENCE Children RA VF AE Middle XOR AD SC AC No concurrency log strictly sequential Simplification check two VFs separate first mandatory second conditional Final structure to Receive Application RA Validate Form VF Assess Eligibility AE X tau to star Request Missing Info RMI tau Validate Form VF Approval Decision AD Send Confirmation SC Archive Case AC
